claims.claim: A three-seed robustness sweep yields a mean lift of +20.3% (range: +20.0% to +20.7%).

evidence_refs.quote: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive inference by proposing candidate token sequences from a fast draft model and verifying them against a target model. The acceptance rate depends on how closely the draft distribution matches the target distribution. We investigate whether a lightweight prompt-domain router can select a domain-specialized draft model that better approximates the target distribution than a single global draft model.
